Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for Julia Eisenman. Dov Grunschlag for and with Bruce Dugstad (Trustee).

Ms. Getchell requested the matter be continued pending review of the informal accounting that was provided this morning, conclusion of the Trust administration and transfer of the Trust assets. The matter was continued to March 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
